opening_angle: connect role's focus on SIP telephony ML systems with candidate's strength in building operationally reliable, data-driven security automation at scale
paragraph_focus: alignment of security engineering and systems thinking with SIP telephony ML challenges
experience building production-grade integrations and data reconciliation across heterogeneous systems
automation and operational reliability in high-stakes environments (UCOP)
pragmatic ML-adjacent work: phishing detection project as evidence of systems-oriented ML thinking
voice_controls: avoid 'machine learning' unless directly applicable; emphasize data integration, automation, and reliability instead
replace speculative ML claims with concrete examples of model-adjacent work (e.g., phishing detection pipeline)
claims_to_avoid: any assertion of direct ML model development or deep learning expertise
phrases like 'leveraging LLMs' or 'building ML pipelines' without direct evidence
inflated claims about impact without measurable anchors from source material
